de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class ProofJavaProgramFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.java.JavaProgramFactory
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.ProofJavaProgramFactory
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.beans.PropertyChangeListener, java.util.EventListener, ProgramFactory, Service

    public class ProofJavaProgramFactory
extends JavaProgramFactory
